heading: Relation to remaining payment authority under production flexibility contracts
label: 7917 Relation to remaining payment authority under production flexibility contracts

children.heading: Termination of superseded payment authority
children.label: a Termination of superseded payment authority
children.text: Notwithstanding or any other provision of law, the Secretary shall not make payments for fiscal year 2002 after , under a production flexibility contract entered into under unless requested by the producer that is a party to the contract.section 7213(a)(7) of this titlesection 7211 of this titleMay 13, 2002

children.heading: Contract payments made before enactment
children.label: b Contract payments made before enactment
children.text: If a producer receives all or any portion of the payment authorized for fiscal year 2002 under a production flexibility contract, the Secretary shall reduce the amount of the direct payment otherwise due the producer for the 2002 crop year under by the amount of the fiscal year 2002 payment received by the producer under the production flexibility contract.section 7913 of this title
